Amended Notice Of Motion To Compel A Second, Independent Medical Examination Of Plaintiff
Off Calendar Feb-05-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. NEIL EISENBERG OF THE EISENBERG LAW OFFICE, TEL. NO. 1-415-990-0079 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. KENNETH VIERRA, JR. OF THE LAW OFFICES OF SANTANA, TCHENG & SYMONDS, TEL. NO. 1-415-777-1308 EXT. 16062 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS KEALANI KITAURA AND NAN KITAURA'S Amended Motion To Compel A Second, Independent Medical Examination Of Plaintiff is DENIED, for failure to show good cause. CCP 2032.320(a). Order signed in open court. Judge Pro tem; Charles Ragan; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported. =302/jpt

Notice Of Motion To Compel A Second, Independent Medical Examination Of Plaintiff
Off Calendar Jan-28-2016 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. As to DEFENDANTS KEALANI KITAURA AND NAN KITAURA'S Motion To Compel A Second, Independent Medical Examination Of Plaintiff, the hearing noticed for January 28, 2016 is off calendar. The moving party has filed amended notice and an amended motion for February 5, 2016. The court has not received courtesy copies of the moving papers. Judge Pro Tem: Vedica Puri, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/JPT)
